name: tmp_yesterday_afternoon_minus5
body: Finally finished the report yesterday, took way longer than expected.

name: tmp_yesterday_early_morning_minus5
body: I signed the lease yesterday and got the keys.

name: tmp_yesterday_far_east_plus12
body: Ran into Marcus at the market yesterday — hadn't seen him in ages.

name: tmp_yesterday_far_west_minus10
body: Dropped off the donation boxes yesterday afternoon.

name: tmp_last_night_daytime_anchor
body: Priya called last night and we talked for two hours.

name: tmp_last_night_early_morning_anchor
body: I barely slept last night, kept waking up every hour.

name: tmp_last_night_late_night_ambiguous
body: Dinner with Dana last night was great — she picked a fantastic place.

name: tmp_last_night_far_east_daytime
body: The storm last night knocked out power for a few hours.

name: tmp_3_days_ago_morning
body: Got the blood work results back 3 days ago, everything looked normal.

name: tmp_5_days_ago_afternoon
body: Sent the invoice 5 days ago and still haven't heard back from them.

name: tmp_a_week_ago_afternoon
body: Called Mom a week ago, need to follow up soon.

name: tmp_two_weeks_ago_morning
body: Two weeks ago I started the new sleep schedule and it's already making a difference.

name: tmp_3_weeks_ago_evening
body: Met with Quentin Ross 3 weeks ago about the new project scope.

name: tmp_last_monday_from_thursday
body: Last Monday's standup ran way over — someone needs to set a timer.

name: tmp_last_tuesday_from_thursday
body: The dentist appointment last Tuesday went fine, no cavities.

name: tmp_last_wednesday_from_thursday
body: Lena and I did the full trail hike last Wednesday — my legs are still sore.

name: tmp_last_friday_from_thursday
body: Submitted the quarterly review last Friday, ahead of the deadline.

name: tmp_last_saturday_from_thursday
body: The farmer's market last Saturday had an incredible peach stand.

name: tmp_today_afternoon_capture
body: Today's retrospective was actually productive for a change.

name: tmp_this_morning_afternoon_capture
body: This morning's run was rough — skipped the hill intervals entirely.

name: tmp_this_morning_early_capture
body: Reading through old notes this morning and found a great idea I'd forgotten.

name: tmp_tonight_late_night_capture
body: Finishing up the proposal tonight so it's ready to send first thing.

name: tmp_day_before_yesterday_model_only
body: The package arrived the day before yesterday, which was faster than expected.

name: tmp_two_months_ago_model_only
body: Two months ago I cut out caffeine completely — still going strong.

name: tmp_next_monday_forward
body: Team offsite is scheduled for next Monday — need to book travel tonight.

name: tmp_in_3_months_forward
body: The lease renewal deadline is in 3 months — marking the calendar now.
